languages.text: "Да. Вне петли вы мертвы, и чертовски давно. Я виде{mf|л|ла} ваши останки".

traits.locale_text: драфт: я видел ваше тело, вы давно мертвы (резкий тон)

languages.text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."
languages.original_text: "Да. Вне петли вы мертвы, и чертовски давно. Я виде{mf|л|ла} ваши останки".

traits.locale_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."
"Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."
"Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

languages.text: “是的。在循环之外，你很早以前就死了。我还见过你的遗骸。”
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: “是的。在循环之外，你很早以前就死了。我还见过你的遗骸。”

languages.text: « Oui. En dehors de la boucle, vous êtes mort depuis très longtemps. J'ai vu votre dépouille. »
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: « Oui. En dehors de la boucle, vous êtes mort depuis très longtemps. J'ai vu votre dépouille. »

languages.text: "Evet. Döngünün dışında ölüsün. Hem de uzun zamandır ölüsün. Kalıntılarını bile gördüm."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: "Evet. Döngünün dışında ölüsün. Hem de uzun zamandır ölüsün. Kalıntılarını bile gördüm."

languages.text: «Sí. Fuera del bucle, usted está muerto, y desde hace muchísimo. He visto personalmente sus restos».
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: «Sí. Fuera del bucle, usted está muerto, y desde hace muchísimo. He visto personalmente sus restos».

languages.text: "Ja. Außerhalb der Schleife seid Ihr tot, und zwar schon verdammt lange. Ich habe Eure sterblichen Überreste gesehen."
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: "Ja. Außerhalb der Schleife seid Ihr tot, und zwar schon verdammt lange. Ich habe Eure sterblichen Überreste gesehen."

languages.text: 「そうだな。ループの外では、お前は死んでいる。そして、かなり長い間死んでいる。お前のお骨を見たことがある。」
languages.original_text: "Yes. Outside the loop, you are dead, and have been for a bloody long time. I've seen your remains."

traits.locale_text: 「そうだな。ループの外では、お前は死んでいる。そして、かなり長い間死んでいる。お前のお骨を見たことがある。」
